3D Puff Print Streetwear

Thick raised foam dimensional graphics on heavyweight hoodies, crewnecks, t-shirts & zip-ups. Premium streetwear that pops off the fabric. Built for brands that stand out.

30Designs
240-450GSM Range
4Product Types
50MOQ (Units)
